revision.comment: suppress display to keep this template out of cs1|2 error categories;
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#invoke:template wrapper|{{#if:{{{_debug|}}}|list|wrap}}|_template=Cite encyclopedia
 |_exclude=access, id, short, term, _debug

 |url={{#if:{{{term|{{{1|}}}}}}
  |{{#if:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}
   |{{#ifexpr:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}} > 999999999
    |https://doi.org/10.1093/OED/{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}
    |https://www.oed.com/view/Entry/{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}
   }}
   |https://www.oed.com/search/dictionary/?q={{urlencode:{{{term|{{{1|}}}}}}}}
  }}
 }}
 |url-access={{#ifeq:{{{access|}}}|free||subscription}}
 |title={{{term|{{{1|}}}}}}
 |dictionary=[[Oxford English Dictionary]] 
 |publisher={{#if:{{{short|}}}||[[Oxford University Press]]}}
 |edition={{#if:{{{short|}}}||Online}}
 |doi={{#if:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}|{{#ifexpr:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}} > 999999999|10.1093/OED/{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}}}}}
 |doi-access={{#if:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}|{{{access|}}}}}
 |ref={{SfnRef|Reference-OED-{{{term|{{{1|}}}}}}}}
}}{{#if:{{{short|}}}||{{#ifeq:{{{access|}}}|free|| {{OEDsub|sentence={{#ifeq:{{{mode|cs1}}}|cs1|yes|no}}}}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia templates
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#invoke:template wrapper|{{#if:{{{_debug|}}}|list|wrap}}|_template=Cite encyclopedia
 |_exclude=access, id, short, term, _debug

 |url={{#if:{{{term|{{{1|}}}}}}
  |{{#if:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}
   |{{#ifexpr:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}} > 999999999
    |https://doi.org/10.1093/OED/{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}
    |https://www.oed.com/view/Entry/{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}
   }}
   |https://www.oed.com/search/dictionary/?q={{urlencode:{{{term|{{{1|}}}}}}}}
  }}
 }}
 |url-access={{#ifeq:{{{access|}}}|free||subscription}}
 |title={{{term|{{{1|}}}}}}
 |dictionary=[[Oxford English Dictionary]] 
 |publisher={{#if:{{{short|}}}||[[Oxford University Press]]}}
 |edition={{#if:{{{short|}}}||Online}}
 |doi={{#if:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}|{{#ifexpr:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}} > 999999999|10.1093/OED/{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}}}}}
 |doi-access={{#if:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}|{{{access|}}}}}
 |ref={{SfnRef|Reference-OED-{{{term|{{{1|}}}}}}}}
}}{{#if:{{{short|}}}||{{#ifeq:{{{access|}}}|free|| {{OEDsub|sentence={{#ifeq:{{{mode|cs1}}}|cs1|yes|no}}}}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]
#redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]
#redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]
#redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]
#redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

<includeonly>{{#invoke:template wrapper|{{#if:{{{_debug|}}}|list|wrap}}|_template=Cite encyclopedia
 |_exclude=access, id, short, term, _debug

 |url={{#if:{{{term|{{{1|}}}}}}
  |{{#if:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}
   |{{#ifexpr:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}} > 999999999
    |https://doi.org/10.1093/OED/{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}
    |https://www.oed.com/view/Entry/{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}
   }}
   |https://www.oed.com/search/dictionary/?q={{urlencode:{{{term|{{{1|}}}}}}}}
  }}
 }}
 |url-access={{#ifeq:{{{access|}}}|free||subscription}}
 |title={{{term|{{{1|}}}}}}
 |dictionary=[[Oxford English Dictionary]] 
 |publisher={{#if:{{{short|}}}||[[Oxford University Press]]}}
 |edition={{#if:{{{short|}}}||Online}}
 |doi={{#if:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}|{{#ifexpr:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}} > 999999999|10.1093/OED/{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}}}}}
 |doi-access={{#if:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}|{{{access|}}}}}
 |ref={{SfnRef|Reference-OED-{{{term|{{{1|}}}}}}}}
}}{{#if:{{{short|}}}||{{#ifeq:{{{access|}}}|free|| {{OEDsub|sentence={{#ifeq:{{{mode|cs1}}}|cs1|yes|no}}}}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#invoke:template wrapper|{{#if:{{{_debug|}}}|list|wrap}}|_template=Cite encyclopedia
 |_exclude=access, id, short, term, _debug

 |url={{#if:{{{term|{{{1|}}}}}}
  |{{#if:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}
   |{{#ifexpr:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}} > 999999999
    |https://doi.org/10.1093/OED/{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}
    |https://www.oed.com/view/Entry/{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}
   }}
   |https://www.oed.com/search/dictionary/?q={{urlencode:{{{term|{{{1|}}}}}}}}
  }}
 }}
 |url-access={{#ifeq:{{{access|}}}|free||subscription}}
 |title={{{term|{{{1|}}}}}}
 |dictionary=[[:en:Oxford English Dictionary|Oxford English Dictionary]] 
 |publisher={{#if:{{{short|}}}||[[Oxford University Press]]}}
 |edition={{#if:{{{short|}}}||Online}}
 |doi={{#if:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}|{{#ifexpr:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}} > 999999999|10.1093/OED/{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}}}}}
 |doi-access={{#if:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}|{{{access|}}}}}
 |ref={{SfnRef|Reference-OED-{{{term|{{{1|}}}}}}}}
}}{{#if:{{{short|}}}||{{#ifeq:{{{access|}}}|free|| {{OEDsub|sentence={{#ifeq:{{{mode|cs1}}}|cs1|yes|no}}}}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#invoke:template wrapper|{{#if:{{{_debug|}}}|list|wrap}}|_template=Cite encyclopedia
 |_exclude=access, id, short, term, _debug

 |url={{#if:{{{term|{{{1|}}}}}}
  |{{#if:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}
   |{{#ifexpr:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}} > 999999999
    |https://doi.org/10.1093/OED/{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}
    |https://www.oed.com/view/Entry/{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}
   }}
   |https://www.oed.com/search/dictionary/?q={{urlencode:{{{term|{{{1|}}}}}}}}
  }}
 }}
 |url-access={{#ifeq:{{{access|}}}|free||subscription}}
 |title={{{term|{{{1|}}}}}}
 |dictionary=[[:en:Oxford English Dictionary|Oxford English Dictionary]] 
 |publisher={{#if:{{{short|}}}||[[Oxford University Press]]}}
 |edition={{#if:{{{short|}}}||Online}}
 |doi={{#if:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}|{{#ifexpr:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}} > 999999999|10.1093/OED/{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}}}}}
 |doi-access={{#if:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}|{{{access|}}}}}
 |ref={{SfnRef|Reference-OED-{{{term|{{{1|}}}}}}}}
}}{{#if:{{{short|}}}||{{#ifeq:{{{access|}}}|free|| {{OEDsub|sentence={{#ifeq:{{{mode|cs1}}}|cs1|yes|no}}}}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}

[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{#invoke:template wrapper|{{#if:{{{_debug|}}}|list|wrap}}|_template=Cite encyclopedia
 |_exclude=access, id, short, term, _debug

 |url={{#if:{{{term|{{{1|}}}}}}
  |{{#if:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}
   |{{#ifexpr:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}} > 999999999

<includeonly>{{#invoke:template wrapper|{{#if:{{{_debug|}}}|list|wrap}}|_template=Cite encyclopedia
 |_exclude=access, id, short, term, _debug

 |url={{#if:{{{term|{{{1|}}}}}}
  |{{#if:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}
   |{{#ifexpr:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}} > 999999999

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#invoke:template wrapper|{{#if:{{{_debug|}}}|list|wrap}}|_template=Cite encyclopedia
 |_exclude=access, id, short, term, _debug

 |url={{#if:{{{term|{{{1|}}}}}}
  |{{#if:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}
   |{{#ifexpr:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}} > 999999999
    |https://doi.org/10.1093/OED/{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}
    |https://www.oed.com/view/Entry/{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}
   }}
   |https://www.oed.com/search/dictionary/?q={{urlencode:{{{term|{{{1|}}}}}}}}
  }}
 }}
 |url-access={{#ifeq:{{{access|}}}|free||subscription}}
 |title={{{term|{{{1|}}}}}}
 |dictionary=[[:en:Oxford English Dictionary|Oxford English Dictionary]] 
 |publisher={{#if:{{{short|}}}||[[Oxford University Press]]}}
 |edition={{#if:{{{short|}}}||Online}}
 |doi={{#if:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}|{{#ifexpr:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}} > 999999999|10.1093/OED/{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}}}}}
 |doi-access={{#if:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}|{{{access|}}}}}
 |ref={{SfnRef|Reference-OED-{{{term|{{{1|}}}}}}}}
}}{{#if:{{{short|}}}||{{#ifeq:{{{access|}}}|free|| {{OEDsub|sentence={{#ifeq:{{{mode|cs1}}}|cs1|yes|no}}}}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}

[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>
<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#invoke:template wrapper|{{#if:{{{_debug|}}}|list|wrap}}|_template=Cite encyclopedia
 |_exclude=access, id, short, term, _debug

 |url={{#if:{{{term|{{{1|}}}}}}
  |{{#if:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}
   |{{#ifexpr:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}} > 999999999
    |https://doi.org/10.1093/OED/{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}
    |https://www.oed.com/view/Entry/{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}
   }}
   |https://www.oed.com/search/dictionary/?q={{urlencode:{{{term|{{{1|}}}}}}}}
  }}
 }}
 |url-access={{#ifeq:{{{access|}}}|free||subscription}}
 |title={{{term|{{{1|}}}}}}
 |dictionary=[[:en:Oxford English Dictionary|Oxford English Dictionary]] 
 |publisher={{#if:{{{short|}}}||[[Oxford University Press]]}}
 |edition={{#if:{{{short|}}}||Online}}
 |doi={{#if:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}|{{#ifexpr:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}} > 999999999|10.1093/OED/{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}}}}}
 |doi-access={{#if:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}|{{{access|}}}}}
 |ref={{SfnRef|Reference-OED-{{{term|{{{1|}}}}}}}}
}}{{#if:{{{short|}}}||{{#ifeq:{{{access|}}}|free|| {{OEDsub|sentence={{#ifeq:{{{mode|cs1}}}|cs1|yes|no}}}}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}

[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#invoke:template wrapper|{{#if:{{{_debug|}}}|list|wrap}}|_template=Cite encyclopedia
 |_exclude=access, id, short, term, _debug

 |url={{#if:{{{term|{{{1|}}}}}}
  |{{#if:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}
   |{{#ifexpr:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}} > 999999999
    |https://doi.org/10.1093/OED/{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}
    |https://www.oed.com/view/Entry/{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}
   }}
   |https://www.oed.com/search/dictionary/?q={{urlencode:{{{term|{{{1|}}}}}}}}
  }}
 }}

 |dictionary=[[:en:Oxford English Dictionary|Oxford English Dictionary]] 
 |publisher={{#if:{{{short|}}}||[[Oxford University Press]]}}
 |edition={{#if:{{{short|}}}||Online}}
 |doi={{#if:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}|{{#ifexpr:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}} > 999999999|10.1093/OED/{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}}}}}

 |ref={{SfnRef|Reference-OED-{{{term|{{{1|}}}}}}}}
}}{{#if:{{{short|}}}||{{#ifeq:{{{access|}}}|free|| {{OEDsub|sentence={{#ifeq:{{{mode|cs1}}}|cs1|yes|no}}}}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}

[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23168229401|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#invoke:template wrapper|{{#if:{{{_debug|}}}|list|wrap}}|_template=Cite encyclopedia
 |_exclude=access, id, short, term, _debug

 |url={{#if:{{{term|{{{1|}}}}}}
  |{{#if:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}
   |{{#ifexpr:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}} > 999999999
    |https://doi.org/10.1093/OED/{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}
    |https://www.oed.com/view/Entry/{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}
   }}
   |https://www.oed.com/search/dictionary/?q={{urlencode:{{{term|{{{1|}}}}}}}}
  }}
 }}
 |url-access={{#ifeq:{{{access|}}}|free||subscription}}
 |title={{{term|{{{1|}}}}}}
 |dictionary=[[:en:Oxford English Dictionary|Oxford English Dictionary]] 
 |publisher={{#if:{{{short|}}}||[[Oxford University Press]]}}
 |edition={{#if:{{{short|}}}||Online}}
 |doi={{#if:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}|{{#ifexpr:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}} > 999999999|10.1093/OED/{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}}}}}
 |doi-access={{#if:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}|{{{access|}}}}}
 |ref={{SfnRef|Reference-OED-{{{term|{{{1|}}}}}}}}
}}{{#if:{{{short|}}}||{{#ifeq:{{{access|}}}|free|| {{OEDsub|sentence={{#ifeq:{{{mode|cs1}}}|cs1|yes|no}}}}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}

[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>
<noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{#invoke:template wrapper|{{#if:{{{_debug|}}}|list|wrap}}|_template=Cite encyclopedia
 |_exclude=access, id, short, term, _debug

 |url={{#if:{{{term|{{{1|}}}}}}
  |{{#if:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}
   |{{#ifexpr:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}} > 999999999
    |https://doi.org/10.1093/OED/{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}
    |https://www.oed.com/view/Entry/{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}
   }}
   |https://www.oed.com/search/dictionary/?q={{urlencode:{{{term|{{{1|}}}}}}}}
  }}
 }}
 |url-access={{#ifeq:{{{access|}}}|free||subscription}}
 |title={{{term|{{{1|}}}}}}
 |dictionary=[[:en:Oxford English Dictionary|Oxford English Dictionary]] 
 |publisher={{#if:{{{short|}}}||[[Oxford University Press]]}}
 |edition={{#if:{{{short|}}}||Online}}
 |doi={{#if:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}|{{#ifexpr:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}} > 999999999|10.1093/OED/{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}}}}}
 |doi-access={{#if:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}|{{{access|}}}}}
 |ref={{SfnRef|Reference-OED-{{{term|{{{1|}}}}}}}}
}}{{#if:{{{short|}}}||{{#ifeq:{{{access|}}}|free|| {{OEDsub|sentence={{#ifeq:{{{mode|cs1}}}|cs1|yes|no}}}}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}

</noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Cite_OED here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Cite_OED for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
<includeonly>{{#invoke:template wrapper|{{#if:{{{_debug|}}}|list|wrap}}|_template=Cite encyclopedia
 |_exclude=access, id, short, term, _debug

 |url={{#if:{{{term|{{{1|}}}}}}
  |{{#if:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}
   |{{#ifexpr:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}} > 999999999
    |https://doi.org/10.1093/OED/{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}
    |https://www.oed.com/view/Entry/{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}
   }}
   |https://www.oed.com/search/dictionary/?q={{urlencode:{{{term|{{{1|}}}}}}}}
  }}
 }}
 |url-access={{#ifeq:{{{access|}}}|free||subscription}}
 |title={{{term|{{{1|}}}}}}
 |dictionary=[[:en:Oxford English Dictionary|Oxford English Dictionary]] 
 |publisher={{#if:{{{short|}}}||[[Oxford University Press]]}}
 |edition={{#if:{{{short|}}}||Online}}
 |doi={{#if:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}|{{#ifexpr:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}} > 999999999|10.1093/OED/{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}}}}}
 |doi-access={{#if:{{{id|{{{2|}}}}}}|{{{access|}}}}}
 |ref={{SfnRef|Reference-OED-{{{term|{{{1|}}}}}}}}
}}{{#if:{{{short|}}}||{{#ifeq:{{{access|}}}|free|| {{OEDsub|sentence={{#ifeq:{{{mode|cs1}}}|cs1|yes|no}}}}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}

[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
